{{Quote|Just once, I'd like to destroy a starship that we didn't pay for!|Hurkk during the [[Battle of Oovo IV]]|<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels">''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''</ref>}}
'''Hurkk''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] who commanded the Imperial forces in the [[Battle of Oovo IV]]. They were furious that the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] was using [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B]] [[Frigate/Legends|frigates]], originally designed for use by the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] to protect convoys from Rebel [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] actions.

{{Char-stub}}
